title: Copper gains amid renewed supply side issues
section_path: Copper gains amid renewed supply side issues
section_path_text: Copper gains amid renewed supply side issues
summary:
Main
Easing trade tensions triggered a risk on tone across markets, boosting appetite for risk assets such as commodities. Metals led the gains while energy was also higher. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: assets/2025-07-03_copper-gains-amid-renewed-supply-side-issues_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_90c26919afe9.png

Market Commentary
Copper pushed above USD10,000/t, as supply side issues raised the prospect of tightness in the physical market.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Easing trade tensions triggered a risk on tone across markets, boosting appetite for risk assets such as commodities. Metals led the gains while energy was also higher.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Copper pushed above USD10,000/t, as supply side issues raised the prospect of tightness in the physical market. Artisanal miners are blockading the transport of copper from some operations in Peru.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: The prospect of tariffs on copper imports into the US has seen traders rush to secure supplies. Comex inventories have subsequently risen sharply.
